description: Deep-research follow-on to Phase D's single-pass root README audit. Runs 20 cli-devin SWE 1.6 iterations clustered into 7 thematic tracks (counts/inventories, claim accuracy, HVR voice, diagrams, external refs/footer, FAQ/Quick Start, cross-runtime + residual). Synthesizes findings into a verified delta. Sonnet @markdown applies HVR-compliant surgical edits to ./README.md.
